description:
You’re mostly stable.

You don’t lose control often, and you can correct quickly when you do.
Now the goal is to maintain this level without slipping.

Right now, you need:
	•	light daily reinforcement
	•	awareness, not effort
	•	consistency over time

Instruction
	•	Keep the system running daily
	•	Don’t drop it completely

Repeat each affirmation 100–200 times per day, split into 1–2 blocks. We recommend a daily repetition of at least 100 per affrimation.

You’re aware, but not stable yet.

You can catch yourself sometimes, but it doesn’t hold consistently.
This is where most people either stabilize or fall back.

Right now, you need:
	•	consistency
	•	fewer gaps during the day
	•	faster correction when you drift

Instruction
	•	Stay engaged throughout the day
	•	Don’t relax too early

Repeat each affirmation 100-200 times per day, split into 1–2 blocks.

You’re reacting more than deciding.

Your thoughts shift during the day, and you lose direction easily.
This isn’t about effort; it’s about structure.

Right now, you need:
	•	frequent interruption
	•	repetition during the day
	•	active control, not passive awareness

Instruction
	•	Use the system multiple times per day
	•	Catch it early, don’t let it run

Repeat each affirmation 800–1200 times per day, split into 4–6 blocks. We recommend a daily target of 600 at least.
